notableMoments: First ever World Cup qualification in 2014 under coach Safet Susic, a watershed moment for the young nation
Edin Dzeko scored Bosnia's first ever World Cup goal against Argentina in their opening match at the 2014 tournament
Beat Iran 3-1 in their final group match in 2014, earning their first ever World Cup victory
Narrowly eliminated in the group stage in 2014 after losses to Argentina (1-2) and Nigeria (0-1)
Qualified for 2026 World Cup through UEFA Play-Off Path A, beating Wales in the semi-final on penalties
Eliminated four-time world champions Italy on penalties (4-1) in the playoff final to secure their place at the 2026 World Cup
Goalkeeper Nikola Vasilj emerged as a national hero with his penalty-saving performances in the playoff campaign
Haris Tabakovic scored a crucial goal in the playoff final against Italy, giving Bosnia the lead before the dramatic shootout
